name: amplify
description: | Use when a prompt is rough, vague, or under-specified and you want it rewritten to high quality before running it. Domain-aware: detects the prompt's domain, stitches the matching specialist standards, reads project rules, and scores the result against an 8-dimension rubric. Standalone — ends with a handoff gate to push the amplified prompt into the chain. Trigger with /hyperflow:amplify, "enhance this prompt", "make this prompt better", "improve my prompt", "rewrite this prompt".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 把粗糙模糊的提示词自动改写成高质量版本，会识别领域、套用对应规范、参照项目规则，并按八维标准打分，适合在正式执行前打磨 prompt。
